interface.shortDescription: Recommend, plan, and run milestone-based initiatives in Codex
interface.longDescription: A lightweight Codex workflow layer built around initiative recommendations, PLAN.md authoring, milestone execution, reviewer verdicts, Git evidence, and a minimal LEDGER.md recovery record.
defaultPrompt: Use Forgeloop to recommend the next initiatives from this source baseline.
Use Forgeloop to write an executable PLAN.md for this initiative.
Use Forgeloop to run this initiative by milestone.
